issues.description: Local constant SELLER_ADMINS_READ uses SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE which is correct for constants, but the name is slightly ambiguous - it could be confused with a query key or an action. The studio app uses SELLER_ADMINS_READ_PERMISSION which is more descriptive.
issues.fix: Rename to SELLER_ADMINS_READ_PERMISSION for clarity and consistency with studio app naming.

patterns.description: NAME-002 fix verified: useAddToCart.ts correctly uses isAdded (boolean with is prefix) throughout. Consumers MobileBarWithCart.tsx, HeroSection.tsx, and ProductCard.tsx all use isAdded correctly.
patterns.verdict: CLEAN - no regression from NAME-002 fix

patterns.description: NAME-003 fix verified: InlineTagEditor.tsx correctly uses isInputVisible (boolean with is prefix) at line 26 and 90. The test file also uses isInputVisible semantics correctly.
patterns.verdict: CLEAN - no regression from NAME-003 fix

patterns.description: PRODUCT_SEARCH_DEBOUNCE_MS follows the SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE naming convention for exported constants. File naming conventions (PascalCase components, camelCase hooks) are consistently followed across all apps.
